tool.name: news_scrape_article
tool.description: Scrape a news article's details including title, content, author, publication date, and source. Navigates to the article URL and extracts structured data.

parameters.name: article_url
parameters.description: Full URL of the news article to scrape (e.g. 'https://www.nytimes.com/2024/01/15/technology/ai-news.html')
